description: When the user asks whether they can change their mind / back out, the chatbot MUST call get_support_content with topic=walk_away_policy. The 7-day walk-away window is a Carvana brand promise; restating it from memory rather than from the pre-baked card is a regression because the timing could drift away from the official policy in a future card edit.

turns.message: can I change my mind after I accept the offer?
